use_codes.desc: MANAGEMENT OF NEPHROPATHIC CYSTINOSIS BY ADMINISTERING A TOTAL DAILY DOSE IN TWO DIVIDED DOSES

indications.text:
PROCYSBI is indicated for the treatment of nephropathic cystinosis in adults and pediatric patients 1 year of
age and older.

age and older.
